summary: Comprehensive testing of CRM Dashboard, Staff Portal, and Website. Backend APIs working well (72% pass rate). Found critical pipeline stage mismatch between frontend and backend.

critical.issue: Frontend has stages: new, contacted, site_visit, quotation, negotiation, converted, completed, lost. Backend has: new, follow_up, survey, quotation, installation, completed, lost. This causes dashboard stats mismatch.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint not found. Gallery upload exists at /api/gallery/upload but no GET endpoint for listing
Contact form requires 'district' field which may not be provided by website form
Pagination returns same lead on different pages - possible ordering issue

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard shows 0 for all pipeline stages because frontend stages don't match backend stages. Leads with 'follow_up' stage are not counted.

action_items: CRITICAL: Align pipeline stages between frontend and backend. Either update frontend PIPELINE_STAGES to match backend (new, follow_up, survey, quotation, installation, completed, lost) OR update backend Lead model to match frontend (new, contacted, site_visit, quotation, negotiation, converted, completed, lost)
Add GET /api/gallery endpoint to list gallery photos
Make 'district' field optional in /api/leads endpoint for website contact form
critical_code_review_comments: Pipeline stage mismatch is causing dashboard stats to show 0 for most stages
Backend Lead model (line 1285) defines stages as: new, follow_up, survey, quotation, installation, completed, lost
Frontend CRMDashboard.js (line 536) defines stages as: new, contacted, site_visit, quotation, negotiation, converted, completed, lost
4 leads have 'follow_up' stage which is not recognized by frontend

success_rate.frontend: 90% (CRM Dashboard, Staff Portal, Website all loading correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline stages mismatch is the main issue. Frontend and backend use different stage names. Backend has 'follow_up', 'survey', 'installation' while frontend has 'contacted', 'site_visit', 'negotiation', 'converted'. This causes dashboard pipeline stats to show 0 for most stages.

crm_dashboard.login_with_otp: PASS - Admin login with mobile OTP works
crm_dashboard.pagination: PARTIAL - Works but may have ordering issues
crm_dashboard.dashboard_stats: PARTIAL - Total leads correct but pipeline stats show 0 due to stage mismatch
crm_dashboard.team_tab: PASS - Shows staff list with stats

staff_portal.assigned_leads: PASS - Staff can see assigned leads
staff_portal.update_lead_status: PASS - Staff can update lead stage

website.contact_form: PARTIAL - Works but requires district field
website.gallery: FAIL - No GET endpoint for gallery listing

rca_of_issue: The pipeline stage mismatch was introduced when frontend was updated with new stage names (contacted, site_visit, negotiation, converted) but backend Lead model was not updated to match. Backend still uses old stages (follow_up, survey, installation). This causes: 1) Dashboard pipeline stats to show 0 for most stages, 2) Leads with 'follow_up' stage not being displayed correctly in frontend filters.
